title: The Mayor's Support
description: Convince the mayor to fund your expedition. His sick sister and outstanding tasks may hold the key.

beacons.name: The Mayor's Request
beacons.description: Mayor Edric offers a reward for anyone who can rid the village of rats, but you need his funding for a greater expedition.

beacons.name: The Village Tavern
beacons.description: At the tavern, you overhear that the mayor's sister, Liara, is gravely ill. A merchant might have a cure, and the mayor has posted several small tasks.

beacons.name: A Sister's Plight
beacons.description: You decide to help Liara. The merchant Valdus has the medicine, but at a steep price. You might also persuade him or steal it.

beacons.name: A Fair Trade
beacons.description: You pay Valdus for the medicine. He hands it over, wishing Liara a swift recovery.

beacons.name: A Risky Theft
beacons.description: You manage to steal the medicine, but Valdus spots you. He vows to report you to the mayor.

beacons.name: Healing Liara
beacons.description: You administer the medicine to Liara. Color returns to her cheeks, and she thanks you profusely.

beacons.name: Civic Duty
beacons.description: You decide to help the village by completing the mayor's tasks. There's a letter to deliver and rats to clear.

beacons.name: A Message Delivered
beacons.description: You deliver an important letter to the neighboring village. The recipient is grateful.

beacons.name: A Rat Problem
beacons.description: You descend into the cellar and clear out the rats plaguing the village stores.

beacons.name: A Job Well Done?
beacons.description: Having completed a task, you consider your next move. You could return to complete another, or go directly to the mayor.

beacons.name: The Hidden Ritual
beacons.description: You stumble upon an ancient ritual site deep in the woods. The air thrums with forgotten magic.

beacons.name: The Haunted Tower
beacons.description: A crumbling tower looms on the hill, said to hold the spirit of a long-dead sorcerer.

beacons.name: The Final Audience
beacons.description: You head to Mayor Edric to request funding for your expedition. He studies you, considering what you've done for him and the village.

beacons.name: A Generous Patron
beacons.description: Impressed by your deeds, the mayor grants you full funding and supplies for your expedition. The village will remember your heroism.

beacons.name: A Modest Contribution
beacons.description: The mayor appreciates your help, but it's not enough for full funding, or your reputation precedes you. He offers half of what you need.

beacons.name: A Stern Refusal
beacons.description: The mayor scoffs at your request. You've done nothing for him or the village. He orders you to leave.
